district_resort = {
	base_buildtime = 480

	exempt_from_ai_planet_specialization = yes
	overlay_icon = GFX_district_trade

	inline_script = { script = districts/BPV_district_slots GOVERNMENT = slot_city_government SLOT1 = slot_resort_01 SLOT2 = slot_resort_02 SLOT3 = slot_resort_02 SLOT4 = slot_resort_02 SLOT5 = slot_resort_02 SLOT6 = slot_resort_02 SLOT7 = slot_resort_02 SLOT8 = slot_resort_02 SLOT9 = slot_resort_02 SLOT10 = slot_resort_02 }

	show_on_uncolonized = {
		exists = from
		from = {
			OR = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				AND = {
					is_servitor_empire = yes
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
				}
			}
		}
		has_modifier = resort_colony
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
				AND = {
					is_servitor_empire = yes
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
				}
			}
		}
		has_modifier = resort_colony
	}

	allow = {
		NOT = { has_modifier = slave_colony }
	}

	conversion_ratio = 1
	convert_to = {
		district_city
		district_arcology_housing
		district_rw_city
		district_nexus
		district_hive
		district_craglands
		district_mindlink
		district_crashed_slaver_ship
		district_prison
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_districts_cities
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					OR = {
						NOT = { has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active }
						is_hive_empire = no
						is_lithoid_empire = yes
					}
					is_civic_plant_organic = no
				}
				NOT = { has_modifier = wooden_planet }
			}
			minerals = @city_cost
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
					OR = {
						is_hive_empire = yes
						is_civic_plant_organic = yes
					}
					is_lithoid_empire = no
					NOT = { has_valid_civic = civic_integrated_bioarchitecture }
				}
				NOT = { has_modifier = wooden_planet }
			}
			minerals = @city_hive_min_cost
			food = @city_hive_food_cost
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				OR = {
					owner = {
						has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
						OR = {
							is_hive_empire = yes
							is_civic_plant_organic = yes
						}
						is_lithoid_empire = no
						has_valid_civic = civic_integrated_bioarchitecture
					}
					has_modifier = wooden_planet
				}
			}
			food = @city_cost
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
					is_civic_avian_construction = yes
					is_hive_empire = no
				}
				NOT = { has_modifier = wooden_planet }
			}
			minerals = 100
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
					is_civic_avian_construction = yes
					OR = {
						is_hive_empire = yes
						has_modifier = wooden_planet
					}
				}
			}
			food = 100
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
					OR = {
						is_hive_empire = no
						is_lithoid_empire = yes
					}
					is_civic_plant_organic = no
					NOT = { has_valid_civic = civic_integrated_bioarchitecture }
				}
				NOT = { has_modifier = wooden_planet }
			}
			energy = 2
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
					OR = {
						is_hive_empire = yes
						is_civic_plant_organic = yes
					}
					is_lithoid_empire = no
				}
				NOT = { has_modifier = wooden_planet }
			}
			energy = 1.3
			food = 0.7
		}
		upkeep = {
			food = 2
			trigger = {
				has_modifier = wooden_planet
			}
		}
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
				has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			}
			waste = -75
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 1
			trigger = {
				has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
				has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_add = 500
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
			has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_amenities_add = 300
			planet_housing_add = -100
		}
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
			has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_amenities_no_happiness_add = 300
			planet_housing_add = -100
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_civic_avian_construction = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_agrarian_empire = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = -200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_resort_worker_add = @special_district_jobs
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_global_flag = expanded_pops_active
				is_servitor_empire = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_resort_drone_add = @special_district_jobs
			job_bio_trophy_add = 500
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_active_tradition = tr_prosperity_public_works }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 100
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_technology = tech_housing_1
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 100
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_technology = tech_housing_2
				NOT = { is_agrarian_empire = yes }
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_regular_empire = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_resort_worker_add = @base_district_jobs
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_tankbound_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_production_overseer_add = 100
		}
	}

	triggered_name = {
		text = resort_default
	}

	triggered_flavor_desc = {
		text = district_resort_desc
	}
}
